candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
The container with which gas would have the greatest pressure?
10.0 g each of three different gases are present in three glass containers of identical volume, as shown below. The temperature of all three flasks is held constant at 298 K.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
已知有三种不同气体,质量均为10.0 g,温度均保持在298 K,问哪种气体在容器中压力最大?

A. $\mathrm{SO_2}$
B. $\mathrm{CH_4}$
C. $\mathrm{NCl_3}$
D. 三种气体在容器中的压力相同
metadata.explanation_zh: 压力与气体的物质的量成正比。在三种气体中,$\ce{CH4}$的摩尔质量最小,因此10.0克$\ce{CH4}$代表最大的物质的量,从而产生最大的压力。
